column5: As of when this list has been created (3/9/2023), I have only seen two of Apichatpong's films, but the Chicago-educated director has grown to be one of the most fascinating artists working in the industry for me. I'm not sure how to even describe their mystic style and approach to storytelling, but I fuck with it really hard. I will be watching all their films over the course of the next few weeks before meeting them in person at a screening of Memoria. I am stoked, and can't wait to explore their full body of work.

column2: Uncle Boonmee Who Can Recall His Past Lives
